rules.issue: Interface material is inheriting non-interface motif language.
rules.recommendation: Use interface_prompt_prelude only for interface/product-led materials.

rules.issue: Resolved prompt is too long for an interface material.
rules.recommendation: Keep interface prompts short: brand truth, one material rule, one reference translation block, one art-direction ask.

rules.issue: No composition/application role-pack refs were selected for a product-led material.
rules.recommendation: Require at least one composition ref and one application ref before generation.
Consider adding deterministic copy so the surface is not image-only.
Too many bans can flatten the composition. Keep only the critical bans.
